name: Customer - CasaModerna Capture Helpers
script:
const CM_SET_HTML=(frm,fieldname,html)=>{const f=frm.get_field(fieldname);if(f&&f.$wrapper)f.$wrapper.html(html||'');};const CM_UNINDENT_HTML_FIELD=(frm,fieldname)=>{const f=frm.get_field(fieldname);if(!f||!f.$wrapper)return;const $ctrl=f.$wrapper.closest('.frappe-control');if(!$ctrl||!$ctrl.length)return;const $label=$ctrl.find('.control-label').first();const labelWidth=$label.length?$label.outerWidth():0;if($label.length)$label.css('display','none');if(labelWidth){f.$wrapper.css({position:'relative',left:(-labelWidth)+'px',width:'calc(100% + '+labelWidth+'px)'});}else{f.$wrapper.css({position:'',left:'',width:''});}};const CM_SECTION_HEAD=(label)=>'
'+__(label)+'
';const CM_SECTION_HEAD_WITH_BUTTON=(label)=>'
'+__(label)+'
';const CM_ESC=(v)=>frappe.utils.escape_html(String(v??''));const CM_RENDER_ADDR=(frm,addressName,targetField)=>{if(!targetField||!frm.fields_dict||!frm.fields_dict[targetField])return; if(!addressName){CM_SET_HTML(frm,targetField,'
No address selected.
');return;} const render=(d)=>{if(!d){CM_SET_HTML(frm,targetField,'
No address selected.
');return;} const parts=[d.address_line1,d.address_line2,d.city,d.pincode,d.country].filter(v=>String(v||'').trim()); const html='
'+parts.map(p=>CM_ESC(p)).join('
')+'
'; CM_SET_HTML(frm,targetField,html);}; const p=frappe.db.get_value('Address',addressName,['address_line1','address_line2','city','pincode','country']); if(p&&typeof p.then==='function'){p.then(r=>render(r&&r.message?r.message:null));} else {frappe.db.get_value('Address',addressName,['address_line1','address_line2','city','pincode','country'],(r)=>render(r&&r.message?r.message:null));}};const CM_RENDER_ADDR_PREVIEWS=(frm)=>{CM_RENDER_ADDR(frm,frm.doc.customer_primary_address,'cm_bill_addr_preview');CM_RENDER_ADDR(frm,frm.doc.shipping_address_name,'cm_ship_addr_preview');};const CM_COPY_CAPTURE_BILL_TO_DEL=(frm)=>{const pairs=[[ 'cm_bill_line1','cm_del_line1'],['cm_bill_line2','cm_del_line2'],['cm_bill_locality','cm_del_locality'],['cm_bill_postcode','cm_del_postcode'],['cm_bill_country','cm_del_country']];const present=new Set(Object.keys(frm.fields_dict||{}));for(const [src,dst] of pairs){if(present.has(dst))frm.set_value(dst,frm.doc[src]||null);}frappe.show_alert({message:__('Copy Billing → Delivery: capture fields copied.'),indicator:'green'});};const CM_RENDER_CAPTURE_HEADERS=(frm)=>{CM_SET_HTML(frm,'cm_bill_capture_header',CM_SECTION_HEAD('Billing Address'));CM_SET_HTML(frm,'cm_delivery_capture_header',CM_SECTION_HEAD_WITH_BUTTON('Delivery Address'));CM_UNINDENT_HTML_FIELD(frm,'cm_bill_capture_header');CM_UNINDENT_HTML_FIELD(frm,'cm_delivery_capture_header');const f=frm.get_field('cm_delivery_capture_header');if(f&&f.$wrapper){f.$wrapper.off('click','[data-cm-copy-capture-bill-to-del]');f.$wrapper.on('click','[data-cm-copy-capture-bill-to-del]',()=>CM_COPY_CAPTURE_BILL_TO_DEL(frm));}};const CM_SET_LOCALITY_QUERIES=(frm)=>{const q=()=>({query:'casamoderna_dms.cm_locality_query.cm_locality_link_query'});if(frm.fields_dict&&frm.fields_dict.cm_bill_locality)frm.set_query('cm_bill_locality',q);if(frm.fields_dict&&frm.fields_dict.cm_del_locality)frm.set_query('cm_del_locality',q);};frappe.ui.form.on('Customer',{setup(frm){CM_SET_LOCALITY_QUERIES(frm);},refresh(frm){CM_SET_LOCALITY_QUERIES(frm);CM_RENDER_CAPTURE_HEADERS(frm);CM_RENDER_ADDR_PREVIEWS(frm);},customer_primary_address(frm){CM_RENDER_ADDR_PREVIEWS(frm);},shipping_address_name(frm){CM_RENDER_ADDR_PREVIEWS(frm);},cm_copy_billing_to_delivery(frm){if(frm.is_new())return;frappe.call({method:'casamoderna_dms.address_tools.copy_customer_billing_to_delivery',args:{customer:frm.doc.name},callback:()=>{frappe.msgprint(__('Copy Billing → Delivery: Delivery address updated from billing.'));frm.reload_doc();}});}});

name: Customer - CasaModerna Minimal View
script: frappe.ui.form.on('Customer',{refresh(frm){const roles=(frappe.user_roles||[]).map(r=>String(r||''));const NOISE_FIELDS=['territory','lead_name','opportunity_name','prospect_name','account_manager','default_currency','default_bank_account','default_price_list','internal_customer_section','more_info','cm_contact_compliance_section'];const EXEMPT_ROLES=[];const isExempt=roles.some(r=>EXEMPT_ROLES.includes(r));const isSales=roles.includes('Sales User')||roles.includes('CasaModerna Sales Console')||roles.some(r=>r.startsWith('CasaModerna')&&r.toLowerCase().includes('sales'));const applyMinimal=(!isExempt);if(!applyMinimal)return;const present=new Set(Object.keys(frm.fields_dict||{}));const hideNoise=()=>{for(const f of NOISE_FIELDS){if(present.has(f)&&frm.get_field(f))frm.toggle_display(f,false);}};hideNoise();if(frappe.after_ajax){frappe.after_ajax(()=>hideNoise());}else{setTimeout(()=>hideNoise(),0);}if(present.has('cm_mobile')){frm.set_df_property('cm_mobile','label','Phone/Mobile');frm.set_df_property('cm_mobile','reqd',1);}if(isSales){for(const f of ['cm_credit_limit','cm_credit_terms_days']){if(present.has(f))frm.set_df_property(f,'read_only',1);}}/* CM_UI_LOCK_APPLY_ALL */;/* CM_UI_LOCK_FALLBACK_GATE */;/* CM_UI_LOCK_NOISE_FIELDS */;}});

name: Sales Order - CasaModerna AB Split Helpers
Item - CasaModerna Pricing Ops
script:
(function(){const CM_SET_HTML=(frm,f,html)=>{const fld=frm.get_field(f);if(fld&&fld.$wrapper)fld.$wrapper.html(html||'');};const CM_ESC=(v)=>frappe.utils.escape_html(String(v??''));const CM_IS_EMPTY=(v)=>v===null||v===undefined||v==='';const CM_FMT_CCY=(v)=>{if(CM_IS_EMPTY(v))return '—';try{return frappe.format(v,{fieldtype:'Currency'});}catch(e){return CM_ESC(String(v));}};const CM_FMT_PCT=(v)=>{if(CM_IS_EMPTY(v))return '—';try{return frappe.format(v,{fieldtype:'Percent',precision:3});}catch(e){return CM_ESC(String(v));}};const cm_set_headline=(frm)=>{try{if(!frm||!frm.dashboard||!frm.doc)return;const d=frm.doc||{};if(CM_IS_EMPTY(d.cm_rrp_ex_vat)&&CM_IS_EMPTY(d.cm_final_offer_inc_vat)&&CM_IS_EMPTY(d.cm_discount_percent))return;const bits=[`${__('RRP (Ex VAT)')}: ${CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_rrp_ex_vat)}`,`${__('Final Offer (Inc VAT)')}: ${CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_final_offer_inc_vat)}`,`${__('Effective Discount')}: ${CM_FMT_PCT(d.cm_discount_percent)}`];frm.dashboard.set_headline(`${bits.join('  •  ')}`);}catch(e){}};const cm_render_pipeline_grid=(frm)=>{if(!frm||!frm.fields_dict||!frm.fields_dict.cm_supplier_price_pipeline_grid)return;const d=frm.doc||{};const effectiveCost=(d.cm_cost_ex_vat!==null&&d.cm_cost_ex_vat!==undefined&&String(d.cm_cost_ex_vat)!=='')?d.cm_cost_ex_vat:d.cm_cost_ex_vat_calculated;const ex=[{l:__('List Ex VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_supplier_list_price_ex_vat)},{l:__('After Increase Ex VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_after_increase_before_ex_vat)},{l:__('After Discount 1 Ex VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_after_discount_1_ex_vat)},{l:__('After Discount 2 Ex VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_after_discount_2_ex_vat)},{l:__('After Discount 3 Ex VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_after_discount_3_ex_vat)},{l:__('Purchase Ex VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_purchase_price_ex_vat)},{l:__('Landed Total Ex VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_landed_additions_total_ex_vat)},{l:__('Cost Ex VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(effectiveCost)},{l:__('Profit Ex VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_profit_ex_vat)},{l:__('RRP Ex VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_rrp_ex_vat)},{l:__('Final Offer Ex VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_final_offer_ex_vat)}];const inc=[{l:__('RRP Inc VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_rrp_inc_vat)},{l:__('Discounted Inc VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_discounted_inc_vat)},{l:__('Final Offer Inc VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_final_offer_inc_vat)}];const mk=(c)=>`
${CM_ESC(c.l)}
${c.v}
`;const rows=(cells)=>{const out=[];for(let i=0;i${cells.slice(i,i+6).map(mk).join('')}`);}return out.join('');};const html=`
${__('Ex VAT')}
${rows(ex)}
${__('Inc VAT')}
${inc.map(mk).join('')}
`;CM_SET_HTML(frm,'cm_supplier_price_pipeline_grid',html);};const cm_render_selling_grid=(frm)=>{if(!frm||!frm.fields_dict||!frm.fields_dict.cm_selling_summary_grid)return;const d=frm.doc||{};const effectiveCost=(d.cm_cost_ex_vat!==null&&d.cm_cost_ex_vat!==undefined&&String(d.cm_cost_ex_vat)!=='')?d.cm_cost_ex_vat:d.cm_cost_ex_vat_calculated;const cells=[{l:__('RRP Inc VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_rrp_inc_vat)},{l:__('Discounted Inc VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_discounted_inc_vat)},{l:__('Final Offer Inc VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_final_offer_inc_vat)},{l:__('Final Offer Ex VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_final_offer_ex_vat)},{l:__('Rounding Delta'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_rounding_delta)},{l:__('Effective Discount'),v:CM_FMT_PCT(d.cm_discount_percent)},{l:__('Purchase Ex VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_purchase_price_ex_vat)},{l:__('Landed Total Ex VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_landed_additions_total_ex_vat)},{l:__('Cost Ex VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(effectiveCost)},{l:__('Profit Ex VAT'),v:CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_profit_ex_vat)},{l:__('Margin'),v:CM_FMT_PCT(d.cm_margin_percent)},{l:__('Markup'),v:CM_FMT_PCT(d.cm_markup_percent)}];const mk=(c)=>`
${CM_ESC(c.l)}
${c.v}
`;const html=`
${cells.slice(0,6).map(mk).join('')}
${cells.slice(6,12).map(mk).join('')}
`;CM_SET_HTML(frm,'cm_selling_summary_grid',html);};const cm_update=async(frm)=>{if(!frm||!frm.fields_dict||!frm.fields_dict.cm_pricing_ops_help)return;const company=frappe.defaults.get_user_default('company')||frappe.defaults.get_default('company');let vat=null;if(company){try{const r=await frappe.db.get_value('Company',company,'cm_vat_rate_percent');vat=(r&&r.message)?r.message.cm_vat_rate_percent:null;}catch(e){vat=null;}}const hasVat=(vat!==null&&vat!==undefined&&String(vat).trim()!=='');let vatLine='';if(!company){vatLine='
VAT not configured: Set a default Company, then set CM VAT Rate (%).
';}else if(!hasVat){vatLine='
VAT not configured: Open Company → '+CM_ESC(company)+' and set CM VAT Rate (%) before entering pricing.
';}else{vatLine='
VAT rate (Company): '+CM_ESC(vat)+'% (editable in Company)
';}const html='
'+vatLine+'
Pricing guide: RRP Ex VAT is source-of-truth; discount applied on VAT-inclusive; non-tiles round up to €1; tiles keep 2dp.
';CM_SET_HTML(frm,'cm_pricing_ops_help',html);cm_set_headline(frm);cm_render_pipeline_grid(frm);cm_render_selling_grid(frm);};const cm_sync_mode=(frm)=>{if(!frm||!frm.doc)return;const v=frm.doc.cm_pricing_mode_ui; if(v==='Tiles (2 Decimals)'){frm.set_value('cm_pricing_rounding_mode','tile_decimal_pricing');}else if(v==='Whole Euro (Round Up)'){frm.set_value('cm_pricing_rounding_mode','whole_euro_roundup');}};frappe.ui.form.on('Item',{refresh(frm){cm_sync_mode(frm);cm_update(frm);},after_save(frm){cm_update(frm);},cm_pricing_mode_ui(frm){cm_sync_mode(frm);cm_update(frm);},cm_supplier_list_price_ex_vat(frm){cm_update(frm);},cm_increase_before_percent(frm){cm_update(frm);},cm_discount_1_percent(frm){cm_update(frm);},cm_discount_2_percent(frm){cm_update(frm);},cm_discount_3_percent(frm){cm_update(frm);},cm_increase_after_percent(frm){cm_update(frm);},cm_discount_target_percent(frm){cm_update(frm);},cm_shipping_percent(frm){cm_update(frm);},cm_shipping_fee(frm){cm_update(frm);},cm_handling_fee(frm){cm_update(frm);},cm_other_landed(frm){cm_update(frm);},cm_rrp_ex_vat(frm){cm_update(frm);},cm_cost_ex_vat(frm){cm_update(frm);}});})();

name: Item - CasaModerna General Overview
script:
(function(){const CM_SET_HTML=(frm,f,html)=>{const fld=frm.get_field(f);if(fld&&fld.$wrapper)fld.$wrapper.html(html||'');};const CM_ESC=(v)=>frappe.utils.escape_html(String(v??''));const CM_FMT_CCY=(v)=>{if(v===null||v===undefined||v===''||Number.isNaN(Number(v)))return '—';try{return frappe.format(v,{fieldtype:'Currency'});}catch(e){return CM_ESC(String(v));}};const CM_FMT_PCT=(v)=>{if(v===null||v===undefined||v===''||Number.isNaN(Number(v)))return '—';try{return frappe.format(v,{fieldtype:'Percent',precision:3});}catch(e){return CM_ESC(String(v));}};const CM_PRODUCT_TYPE=(doc)=>{if(doc&&doc.variant_of)return __('Variant');if(doc&&doc.has_variants)return __('Template');return __('Item');};const CM_FULFILMENT=(doc)=>{if(!doc)return '—';return doc.is_stock_item?__('Stock'):__('Non-stock');};const cm_render_meta=(frm)=>{if(!frm.fields_dict||!frm.fields_dict.cm_general_meta_panel)return;const doc=frm.doc||{};const html=`
${__('Product Type')}
${CM_ESC(CM_PRODUCT_TYPE(doc))}
${__('Fulfilment')}
${CM_ESC(CM_FULFILMENT(doc))}
`;CM_SET_HTML(frm,'cm_general_meta_panel',html);};const cm_render_pricing=(frm)=>{if(!frm.fields_dict||!frm.fields_dict.cm_general_pricing_summary)return;const d=frm.doc||{};const html=`
${__('Pricing')}
${__('RRP (Ex VAT)')}
${CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_rrp_ex_vat)}
${__('Final Offer (Inc VAT)')}
${CM_FMT_CCY(d.cm_final_offer_inc_vat)}
${__('Effective Discount')}
${CM_FMT_PCT(d.cm_discount_percent)}
`;CM_SET_HTML(frm,'cm_general_pricing_summary',html);};const cm_render_attachments=(frm)=>{if(!frm.fields_dict||!frm.fields_dict.cm_general_attachments_panel)return;const info=frm.get_docinfo?frm.get_docinfo():null;const atts=(info&&info.attachments)?info.attachments:[];let body='';if(!atts||!atts.length){body=`
${__('No files attached.')}
`;}else{const rows=atts.map(a=>{const name=CM_ESC(a.file_name||a.name||'');const url=CM_ESC(a.file_url||'#');return `
${name}
`;}).join('');body=`
${rows}
`;}const html=`
${body}
`;CM_SET_HTML(frm,'cm_general_attachments_panel',html);};const cm_emphasize_image=(frm)=>{const f=frm.get_field('image');if(!f||!f.$wrapper)return;const $w=f.$wrapper;try{$w.css({maxWidth:'100%'});$w.find('img').css({width:'100%',height:'auto',maxHeight:'520px',objectFit:'contain'});}catch(e){}};frappe.ui.form.on('Item',{refresh(frm){cm_render_meta(frm);cm_render_pricing(frm);cm_render_attachments(frm);cm_emphasize_image(frm);},onload_post_render(frm){cm_render_meta(frm);cm_render_pricing(frm);cm_render_attachments(frm);cm_emphasize_image(frm);},cm_rrp_ex_vat(frm){cm_render_pricing(frm);},cm_final_offer_inc_vat(frm){cm_render_pricing(frm);},cm_discount_percent(frm){cm_render_pricing(frm);},has_variants(frm){cm_render_meta(frm);},variant_of(frm){cm_render_meta(frm);},is_stock_item(frm){cm_render_meta(frm);}});})();

name: Supplier - CasaModerna Profile
script: (function(){const CM_ESC=(v)=>frappe.utils.escape_html(String(v??''));const cm_set_headline=(frm)=>{try{if(!frm||!frm.dashboard||!frm.doc||!frm.doc.name)return;const d=frm.doc||{};const bits=[`${__('Code')}: ${CM_ESC(d.name)}`];if(d.disabled)bits.push(`${__('Disabled')}`);if(d.on_hold)bits.push(`${__('On Hold')}`);frm.dashboard.set_headline(`${bits.join('  •  ')}`);}catch(e){}};const cm_link=(doctype,name)=>({link_doctype:doctype,link_name:name});const cm_add_buttons=(frm)=>{try{if(!frm||frm.is_new()||!frm.doc||!frm.doc.name)return;frm.add_custom_button(__('New Contact'),()=>{frappe.new_doc('Contact',{links:[cm_link('Supplier',frm.doc.name)]});},__('Create'));frm.add_custom_button(__('New Address'),()=>{frappe.new_doc('Address',{address_title:frm.doc.supplier_name||frm.doc.name,address_type:'Billing',links:[cm_link('Supplier',frm.doc.name)]});},__('Create'));frm.add_custom_button(__('New Bank Account'),()=>{frappe.new_doc('Bank Account',{party_type:'Supplier',party:frm.doc.name});},__('Create'));frm.add_custom_button(__('Bank Accounts'),()=>{frappe.set_route('List','Bank Account',{party_type:'Supplier',party:frm.doc.name});},__('View'));}catch(e){}};frappe.ui.form.on('Supplier',{refresh(frm){cm_set_headline(frm);cm_add_buttons(frm);try{if(frm.fields_dict&&frm.fields_dict.default_bank_account){frm.set_df_property('default_bank_account','label',__('Default Bank Account'));}}catch(e){}}});})();

name: Quotation - CasaModerna Payment Schedule
Quotation - CasaModerna Totals Display
